message:
feat(hostcall): add S3-FIFO admission policy with tenant fairness budgets

Implements a three-tier S3-FIFO-inspired admission control system for
the hostcall request queue, providing per-tenant fairness guarantees and
adaptive signal quality monitoring:

Hostcall queue (src/hostcall_queue.rs):
- QueueTenant trait: optional per-request tenant key for fairness
  accounting, with blanket impls for primitive types
- S3FifoConfig/State/Telemetry: configurable tenant budgets, ghost
  queue capacity, signal quality thresholds, and automatic fallback
  to conservative FIFO when admission feedback is unstable
- Auto-degrades via InsufficientSignalQuality or UnstableAdmission-
  Feedback when signal samples are too few or rejection streaks exceed
  thresholds

Standalone policy module (src/hostcall_s3_fifo.rs):
- Deterministic tri-queue policy core (small/main/ghost) that is
  runtime-agnostic and side-effect free
- AdmitSmall → PromoteSmallToMain lifecycle with ghost-based reuse
  signals for intelligent re-admission

Extensions JS (src/extensions_js.rs):
- Implement QueueTenant for HostcallRequest using extension_id as
  the tenant key, enabling per-extension fairness enforcement

Includes smoke test verifying admit-then-promote lifecycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
